decider_result.reason: Selected citizens have high risk hints and significant declines in well-being metrics.

failure_modes: Overlooking citizens with lower risk hints but significant declines in well-being metrics.
Misclassifying citizens due to insufficient data points or anomalies in the dataset.
Focusing solely on high-risk hints without considering overall well-being trends.
guardrails: Ensure a balanced approach by considering both high risk hints and significant negative changes in well-being metrics.
Validate findings with additional data sources if available.
Regularly review and update the criteria for identifying suboptimal well-being trajectories.
planner_result.strategy: Identify citizens with the highest risk hints and significant declines in well-being metrics (activity, sleep, exposure) to prioritize interventions.
